docket_entries.description: APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68511.3 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT ORTIZ, SR., JACK
REMOVED FROM COURT TRIAL CALENDAR SET FOR MAR-10-2008 - CASE SETTLED. TERMS OF SETTLEMENT PLACED ON THE RECORD. JUDGE MARY E. WISS, REPORTER DIANA CHEN, CLERK LINDA FONG / CLARK BANAYAD (504)

HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT JACK ORTIZ, SR.'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT BEING UNABLE TO EXAMINE APPLICANT RULED ON THE APPLICATION SUBMITTED. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE APPLICANT'S INCOME IS ENOUGH TO PAY THE COMMON NECESSARIES OF LIFE AND COURT FEES AND COSTS. JACK ORTIZ,SR. HAS TEN DAYS TO PAY THE FILING FEES OR THE FILINGS WILL BE STRICKEN. ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF FEE SENT TO ALL PARTIES. JUDGE: JAMES J. MCBRIDE; CLERK: D.LOK; REPORTER: SUSAN LEE, #4280 (D206)
